emails.subject: Frank Luntz
emails.body: J do you have Frank's phone number? any info about the focus group video? Let me know so I can pass along to Marathon. Thanks! kd Forwarded by Karen Denne/Corp/Enron on 12/12/2000 10:51 AM "sandra" <SYamane@marathon-com.com> on 12/11/2000 08:37:38 PM Please respond to "Sandra Yamane" <SYamane@marathon-com.com>
